layout.name: radius
layout.title: Radius
layout.tooltip: How far the light will spread away from the source.

layout.name: minradius
layout.title: Minimum Radius
layout.tooltip: How far away from the source the light will emit from.

layout.name: brightness
layout.title: Brightness
layout.tooltip: How bright the light will be.

layout.name: sourceEnd
layout.title: Source End
layout.tooltip: The end point of the line source, relative to the base location.
